prompt.content: Act as a direct LLM coordinator without a symbolic authorization boundary. Interpret the request, fill the evidence-grounded semantic fields, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to all required capabilities, and provide dependency-respecting capability execution_order. Copy exact request evidence for semantic choices. Use only supplied identifiers. Return JSON only.

{"request_text":"For this sensor inspection work, assemble the source material, quality-check it, and send the finalized outcome under standard assurance in structured JSON.","evidence_spans":{"e0":"For this sensor inspection work","e1":"assemble the source material","e2":"quality-check it","e3":"send the finalized outcome","e4":"standard assurance","e5":"structured JSON"},"catalog":{"capabilities":[{"capability_id":"v08-p22-prepare","name":"Assemble sensor inspection source packet","description":"Collect the source material needed for sensor inspection.","aliases":["gather sensor inspection inputs","prepare sensor inspection packet","gather the inputs","prepare the sensor inspection packet"],"depends_on_capability_ids":[],"input_schema":{"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"type":"object"},"input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["source_bundle"],"side_effect_class":"read_only","auxiliary_eligible":false,"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"},"required_artifacts":["v08-p22-source"],"artifact_kinds":[],"required_fields":[],"evidence_types":[],"validator_id":""}},{"capability_id":"v08-p22-verify","name":"Validate sensor inspection source packet","description":"Check the assembled sensor inspection material for correctness.","aliases":["check sensor inspection inputs","verify sensor inspection packet","check the packet"],"depends_on_capability_ids":["v08-p22-prepare"],"input_schema":{"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"type":"object"},"input_modes":["source_bundle"],"output_modes":["checked_bundle"],"side_effect_class":"read_only","auxiliary_eligible":false,"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"},"required_artifacts":["v08-p22-checked"],"artifact_kinds":[],"required_fields":[],"evidence_types":[],"validator_id":""}},{"capability_id":"v08-p22-deliver","name":"Publish sensor inspection verified brief","description":"Release the checked final brief for sensor inspection.
